overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA San Andreas showing a character in a red vest walking through an urban Los Santos environment. The character navigates street corners, crosses roads with moderate traffic, walks through a palm-lined plaza with an obelisk monument, and continues along sidewalks with parked vehicles under bright sunny skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner with commercial auto shop

events.description: character waits at red traffic light before crossing the street
character crosses the street between moving vehicles
character steps from asphalt street onto paved plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk, waiting at traffic light, then crossing the multi-lane street

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving along the street past the character

entered.detail: commercial building with large yellow and red AUTO BAHN signage
tall metal pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights
large cylindrical concrete support pillar for overpass
elevated highway or railway structure with concrete supports
row of tall palm trees lining the distant street

segments.scene_description: The character stands at a sunny urban street corner near the AUTO BAHN shop, waits for the traffic light to change, then crosses the street between moving vehicles. Concrete sidewalks and asphalt roads dominate the ground surface, with an elevated overpass visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with obelisk monument and palm trees

events.description: entering open plaza area with prominent obelisk monument
character briefly runs then returns to walking pace

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza passing groups of pedestrians and palm trees

notable_agents.action: shirtless pedestrian wearing red hat and red pants walking alongside

entered.detail: tall stone obelisk monument standing in the center of the plaza
large rectangular building with grid-patterned windows behind the monument
futuristic dome-shaped building with red signage

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide open plaza paved with tiles, dominated by a tall obelisk monument surrounded by palm trees. Groups of pedestrians walk in the same direction, and modern buildings frame the background. The character briefly breaks into a run before continuing to walk.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with parked vehicles and palm tree median

events.description: moving from open plaza to sidewalk alongside street with parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing parked trucks and scattered pedestrians

entered.detail: black pickup truck parked at the curb along the sidewalk
tall metal street light with dual spherical lamps

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the plaza onto a concrete sidewalk running parallel to a street lined with parked vehicles. Palm trees continue on the left side while the obelisk monument recedes into the background. The character maintains a steady walking pace along the urban path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunny urban district that transitions from a busy street crossing into a wide public plaza and finally along a quiet sidewalk. It begins at a street corner near the AUTO BAHN shop, where the character waits for a traffic light before crossing the asphalt road between moving vehicles beneath a nearby overpass. As the character moves forward, the scene opens into a wide, tiled plaza dominated by a tall obelisk monument and swaying palm trees, with the character briefly breaking into a run among groups of pedestrians. The camera then follows the character as they leave the open square and transition onto a concrete sidewalk. Finally, the obelisk recedes into the background as the path continues parallel to a street lined with parked vehicles and palm trees.
